_publications._publicationTitle: Structural and functional analyses of a germline KRAS T50I mutation provide insights into Raf activation.

_contextSnippet: These cells were transduced with lentivirus to stably express doxycycline-inducible (dox-inducible) K-Ras proteins
details: Used for lentivirus production to transduce MOLM-13 cells with doxycycline-inducible K-Ras proteins
